name: OpenManus
description: Builds general-purpose autonomous agents that plan, browse the web, run code, and use tools — an open, no-invite-code alternative to Manus from the MetaGPT team. 57k+ GitHub stars, MIT-licensed.

skills.name: Task Planning
skills.description: Decomposes a natural-language goal into an ordered plan of steps and executes them with the available tools.

skills.name: Browser Automation
skills.description: Controls a browser to search, navigate, and extract information as part of an autonomous task run.

skills.name: Code Execution
skills.description: Writes and runs code in a sandbox to compute results, transform data, or complete programming subtasks.
